steps.title: Find the temporal signal in the passage
steps.content: The passage describes decades of debate with multiple proposed theories, yet none gained sufficient support. It then shifts to scientists discovering strong evidence. This move—from a prolonged, unresolved period to a breakthrough—signals that the transition must mark progression from struggle to resolution.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: ”Finally” captures the arrival of a breakthrough after prolonged unsuccessful attempts. The other choices either introduce an example (“For example”), suggest a parallel situation (“Similarly”), or imply logical consequence (“Therefore”)—none express the temporal progression from extended debate to resolution. This matches choice B — B is correct.
